parameters.query: SELECT id, name, trello_board_id, us_pending, us_done, team FROM project WHERE name ILIKE '{{ $json.project_name }}' LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, name, email, role, skills, experience_years, assigned_effort_points FROM profile WHERE id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $node['Get Project'].json.team }}]::int[]);
UPDATE project SET us_pending = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.us_pending) }}'::jsonb WHERE id = {{ $json.project_id }};
SELECT email FROM profile WHERE name ILIKE '{{ $json.fullName }}' LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, name, trello_board_id, us_pending, us_done FROM project WHERE name ILIKE '{{ $node['Parse LLM1'].json.project_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1;
